About JanoEnergy

Company Profile

JanoEnergy New Energy Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2018 and is headquartered in Tianjin, China. The company focuses on the development, investment, construction, and operation of new energy, committed to becoming an industry-leading full-chain service provider.

Our business covers wind power, solar PV, energy storage, and other fields, with projects spanning multiple provinces across China. With a professional technical team and rich industry experience, we provide customers with one-stop solutions from early-stage development to operation and maintenance.

Our History

2018

Company Founded

JanoEnergy Group was established, embarking on the new energy journey

2020

First Project Grid-connected

First wind power project successfully connected to the grid

2022

Business Expansion

Entered solar and energy storage sectors, achieving diversified development

2024

Scale Breakthrough

Cumulative installed capacity exceeded 500MW

Core Values

Green Development

Adhering to sustainable development and promoting clean energy adoption

Innovation Driven

Continuous technological innovation to improve project efficiency and returns

Win-Win Cooperation

Growing together with partners to create long-term value
